use_cases: Visualizing security incident response flow from events to resolution
Monitoring conversion funnels in SaaS applications
Analyzing user journey stages with layered data representation
Tracking alert-to-escalation pipelines in DevOps monitoring tools
Displaying quantitative data breakdowns with categorical hierarchy
ai_summary: A layered funnel chart component from Reaviz that visualizes quantitative data through stacked, semi-transparent funnel layers. The component renders an incident report style visualization with a pink/magenta color scheme, tooltips, and styled shadows. It displays categorical data points (All Events, Alerts Triggered, Incidents Created, Escalated, Resolved) in a vertical funnel format with graduated opacity layers for visual depth. Built as a composite data visualization using reaviz primitives including FunnelChart, FunnelSeries, and FunnelArc with layered variant.
